name: Ideal Power Inc.
business: Ideal Power Inc. is solely focused on the further development and commercialization of its B-TRAN solid-state switch technology, and has launched two commercial products: the discrete B-TRAN and the SymCool Power Module. The company sells to large companies for evaluation and has secured engagements with global automakers, power management leaders, and circuit protection manufacturers.
sellsTo: renewable energy and energy storage systems
Forbes Global 500 diverse power management market leaders

exposures.sentence: We are solely focused on the further development and commercialization of our B-TRAN solid-state switch technology.

Target markets for current and future B-TRAN -based products include, but are not limited to, AI data centers, solid-state circuit protection, static transfer switches ( STS ), electric and plug-in hybrid electric vehicles, electric vehicle charging, renewable energy and energy storage systems uninterruptible power supplies ( UPS ), industrial motor drives, solid state transformers ( SST ), power distribution and transmission switches and other industrial and defense markets.

catalysts.event: Multi-year strategic cooperation agreement with first design win customer
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, we entered into a multi-year strategic cooperation agreement with this customer for the design, development and worldwide sales of circuit protection solutions including SSCBs, battery disconnect units and EV contactors featuring B-TRAN .

catalysts.event: Expect to announce additional design wins and/or custom development agreements in 2026
catalysts.sentence: We expect to announce additional design wins and/or custom development agreements with this customer and/or other customers in 2026.

catalysts.event: Expect to recognize modest revenue from product sales and development agreements in 2026
catalysts.sentence: We expect to recognize modest revenue from both product sales and development agreements in 2026.

tamClaims.claim: The power electronics market is forecasted to grow to $37.7 billion by 2028.
tamClaims.sentence: According to Mordor Intelligence, the power electronics market is forecasted to grow to $37.7 billion by 2028.
